framework.name: AIMS (Agent Identity Management System) - IETF draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00
framework.description: First IETF draft composing WIMSE + SPIFFE + OAuth 2.0 into a unified agent identity framework. Authentication layer is solid but authorization stops at the token boundary. Security Considerations section literally says 'TODO Security.' Version -00 dropped March 2, 2026.
framework.raw_quote: The authentication layer is solid. The authorization layer stops at the token boundary. The Security Considerations section contains two words: 'TODO Security.'

source.title: AI Agent Authentication Gets the Hard Part Right. Authorization Is Still ...
